name: Texas Roadhouse, Inc.
summary: PART I Texas Roadhouse,Inc. (the "Company," "we," "our," and/or "us") was incorporated under the laws of the state of Delaware in 2004. The principal executive office is located in Louisville, Kentucky. Introduction The Company is a growing restaurant company operating predominantly in the casual dining segment. Our late founder, W.
